9: SP: Right para-aortic lymph nodes
10: SP: Right common iliac lymph nodes
11: SP: Left common iliac lymph nodes
12: SP: Left para-aortic lymph nodes

DIAGNOSIS:

1) UTERUS, BILATERAL OVARIES AND FALLOPIAN TUBES; HYSTERECTOMY AND BILATERAL SALPINGO-
OOPHORECTOMY:
- ADENOCARCINOMA OF ENDOMETRIUM, ENDOMETRIOID TYPE, NOS, FIGO GRADE 1;
(<- 6% SOLID GROWTH), NUCLEAR GRADE 2.
- NO DEFINITIVE MYOMETRIAL INVASION IDENTIFIED.
- NO ENDOCERVICAL INVASION IS IDENTIFIED.
- NO VASCULAR INVASION IS IDENTIFIED.
- THE ENDOMETRIUM SHOWS THE FOLLOWING ABNORMALITY: COMPLEX HYPERPLASIA WITH ATYPIA.
- THE MYOMETRIUM SHOWS THE FOLLOWING ABNORMALITIES: ADENOMYOSIS AND ADENOMYOMATOUS POLYP.
- ALL ADNEXAE ARE UNREMARKABLE.
- BENIGN PARATUBAL CYSTS AT RIGHT SIDE.

2) IP LIGAMENT, RIGHT DISTAL; BIOPSY:
- BENIGN FIBROVASCULAR AND ADIPOSE TISSUE.

3) LYMPH NODES, LEFT EXTERNAL ILIAC; BIOPSY:
- THREE BENIGN LYMPH NODES (0/3).
